headline: Salesforce Grants Equity Awards to Apromore Under Its Inducement Equity Incentive Plan
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 25, 2026--Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the #1 AI CRM, today announced it has granted equity awards under its 2014 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan (the "Plan") to new employees who joined Salesforce in connection with the acquisition of Apromore. The Plan was adopted by the Salesforce Board of Directors in July 2014, in accordance with New York Stock Exchange Rule 303A.08.

raw.headline: Salesforce Grants Equity Awards to Apromore Under Its Inducement Equity Incentive Plan

The Plan was adopted by the Salesforce Board of Directors in July 2014, in accordance with New York Stock Exchange Rule 303A.08.

headline: Adecco’s Agentforce Rollout Puts Salesforce’s AI Story To The Test
summary: Adecco Group is rolling out Salesforce's Agentforce 360 across its global recruitment operations in a multi year partnership. The company is also adopting Agentforce Voice to bring AI driven assistance into recruiter workflows across regions. The deployment is tied to efficiency gains, faster time to fill roles, and the ability to scale AI supported processes internationally. Salesforce (NYSE:CRM), trading at $183.02, is pushing its AI story beyond product announcements into real client...

headline: Why a Salesforce Executive Left Tech for Humanitarian Aid
summary: After years as CFO of Salesforce, Amy Weaver is pivoting from software to humanitarian aid. The now-CEO of Direct Relief shares how she is applying Silicon Valley’s playbook on capital and technology to global crisis response—and what other finance leaders can learn about mission-driven strategy.
